Dimensions.Title: Sheet Not Accessed In Over 30 Days
Dimensions.Label: Sheet Not Accessed In Over 30 Days

Dimensions.Title: App Contains Synthetic Keys
Dimensions.Label: App Contains Synthetic Keys
Dimensions.Description:
Indicates if an app's data model contains one or more synthetic keys.
A synthetic key is created when two or more fields are found in two or more tables within an app data model.

Dimensions.Title: Table is Island
Dimensions.Label: Table is Island
Dimensions.Description: Indicates if a table is associated with any other table within app data model.

Dimensions.Title: App Not Accessed In Over 60 Days
Dimensions.Label: App Not Accessed In Over 60 Days

Dimensions.Title: Sheet Not Accessed In Over 90 Days
Dimensions.Label: Sheet Not Accessed In Over 90 Days

Dimensions.Title: App Description
Dimensions.Label: App Description
Dimensions.Description:
App Description

The description of the app, as set by the app developer in app properties.

Dimensions.Title: Reload CPU Time (ms)
Dimensions.Label: Reload CPU Time (ms)
Dimensions.Description: Engine CPU time spent during last app reload, given in milliseconds (ms). Note: this is not the same as Reload Duration reported in other Monitor Apps, but is specific to the time that the engine spent to reload the app.

Dimensions.Title: Field Name
Dimensions.Label: Field Name
Dimensions.Description: Unique to each app and table

Dimensions.Title: App Reload CPU Time Over Threshold
Dimensions.Label: App Reload CPU Time Over Threshold

Dimensions.Title: Last Reload (Date)
Dimensions.Label: Last Reload (Date)
Dimensions.Description: Date when the app was last reloaded

Dimensions.Title: Last Reloaded (Timestamp)
Dimensions.Label: Last Reloaded (Timestamp)
Dimensions.Description: Timestamp when app was last reloaded.

Dimensions.Title: AppID
Dimensions.Label: AppID
Dimensions.Description: App ID as reported in QMC

Dimensions.Title: Last Reloaded
Dimensions.Label: Last Reloaded
Dimensions.Description: Buckets of time when app was last reloaded

Dimensions.Title: App Name
Dimensions.Label: App Name
Dimensions.Description: The text representation of the AppName field (not unique).

Dimensions.Title: App Type
Dimensions.Label: App Type
Dimensions.Description: Whether the app is a Qlik Sense app 'QS' or QlikView app 'QV'.

Dimensions.Title: Field is Synthetic
Dimensions.Label: Field is Synthetic
Dimensions.Description:
Indicates if a field is part of a synthetic key.
A synthetic key is created when two or more fields are found in two or more tables within an app data model.
Note that Synthetic Fields will be listed as having 0 field records. Please rely on the field cardinality to understand the volume of records for these synthetic fields.

Dimensions.Title: Table Name (Unique)
Dimensions.Label: Table Name (Unique)
Dimensions.Description: Unique table name within each app (to distinguish tables with same name but from different apps.)

Dimensions.Title: Sheet Not Accessed In Over 60 Days
Dimensions.Label: Sheet Not Accessed In Over 60 Days

Dimensions.Title: App Not Accessed In Over 90 Days
Dimensions.Label: App Not Accessed In Over 90 Days

Dimensions.Title: Session Time Drill
Dimensions.Label: Session Date, Session Hour, Session Minute

Dimensions.Title: App Is Distributed
Dimensions.Label: App Is Distributed
Dimensions.Description: Whether the application has been distributed to Qlik Cloud from either Qlik Sense Enterprise Client-Managed or QlikView Publisher.

Dimensions.Title: App Contains Data Island(s)
Dimensions.Label: App Contains Data Island(s)
Dimensions.Description:
Indicates if an app contains one or more island tables in the data model.
An island table is one which does not share any common field with another table and, therefore, is not associated with other data tables.

Dimensions.Title: App Name
Dimensions.Label: App Name
Dimensions.Description: Unique to each AppId (to distinguish apps with same name)

Dimensions.Title: Table Contains Synthetic Keys
Dimensions.Label: Table Contains Synthetic Keys
Dimensions.Description:
Indicates if a table within an app data model contains one or more synthetic keys.
A synthetic key is created when two or more fields are found in two or more tables within an app data model.

Dimensions.Title: App Not Accessed In Over 30 Days
Dimensions.Label: App Not Accessed In Over 30 Days

Variables.Title: startMsg
Variables.Expression: Reloading App Analyzer v6.6.0 from engine-oape-5g-int-reload-short-duration-595bd8dc78-924zf running QIX Engine version 12.2731.0

Variables.Title: reload_message
Variables.Expression: At 2026-03-07 09:50:59, App Analyzer v6.6.0 finished reloading on engine-oape-5g-int-reload-short-duration-595bd8dc78-924zf (QIX Engine 12.2731.0) after 26 seconds.

Variables.Title: vRollingLineMeasure
Variables.Expression:
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App RAM (MB)',num(Round(Avg({<[AppRAM_MB - Rolling]-={0}>}[AppRAM_MB - Rolling]),1), '#,###.','.',','),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App Peak Reload RAM (MB)',num(Round(Avg({<[AppRAMPeakReload_MB - Rolling]-={0}>}[AppRAMPeakReload_MB - Rolling]),1), '#,###.','.',','),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Rows',num(Round(Avg({<[AppTableNoOfRows - Rolling]-={0}>}[AppTableNoOfRows - Rolling]),1), '#,###.','.',','),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Fields',num(Round(Avg({<[AppNumberOfDistinctFields - Rolling]-={0}>}[AppNumberOfDistinctFields - Rolling]),1), '#,###.','.',','),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Tables',num(Round(Avg({<[AppNoOfTables - Rolling]-={0}>}[AppNoOfTables - Rolling]),1), '#,###.','.',','),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Reload Time (hh:mm:ss)',Interval(Round(Avg({<[App Reload CPU Time (ms) - Rolling]-={0}>}[App Reload CPU Time (ms) - Rolling])/1000)/(60*60*24),'hh:mm:ss')))))))

Variables.Title: vMaxAvgSheetViewDurationPMTD
vMaxAvgSheetViewEventsCMPMTDBySessionAndDay
Variables.Expression: =[Max Avg Sheet Navigation Events by Session and Day CM and PMTD]

Variables.Title: vMaxSheetViewDurationCMPMTDByDay
Variables.Expression: =Max(Aggr([Avg Sheet View Duration PMTD and CM],SessionDay))

Variables.Title: vRollingLineMeasureLineChart
Variables.Expression:
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App RAM (MB)',Round(Avg({<[AppRAM_MB - Rolling]-={0}>}[AppRAM_MB - Rolling]),1),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App Peak Reload RAM (MB)',Round(Avg({<[AppRAMPeakReload_MB - Rolling]-={0}>}[AppRAMPeakReload_MB - Rolling]),1),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Rows',Round(Avg({<[AppTableNoOfRows - Rolling]-={0}>}[AppTableNoOfRows - Rolling]),1),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Fields',Round(Avg({<[AppNumberOfDistinctFields - Rolling]-={0}>}[AppNumberOfDistinctFields - Rolling]),1),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Tables',Round(Avg({<[AppNoOfTables - Rolling]-={0}>}[AppNoOfTables - Rolling]),1),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Reload Time (hh:mm:ss)',Interval(Round(Avg({<[App Reload CPU Time (ms) - Rolling]-={0}>}[App Reload CPU Time (ms) - Rolling])/1000)/(60*60*24),'hh:mm:ss')))))))
